stories.title: Example User Story - User Registration
stories.story: As a new user, I want to create an account so that I can access personalized features and save my preferences
acceptanceCriteria: GIVEN I am on the registration page
WHEN I enter valid information (email, password, confirm password)
THEN I should successfully create an account
AND I should receive a confirmation email
AND I should be automatically logged in
AND I should be redirected to the dashboard
stories.businessValue: Enables user onboarding and personalization, foundation for user engagement and retention
stories.technicalNotes: Implement secure password hashing, email validation, and user session management
risks: Email deliverability issues could prevent account confirmation
Password strength requirements may frustrate users
GDPR compliance requirements for user data
testCases: Valid registration with all required fields

stories.title: Example User Story - Data Export
stories.story: As a power user, I want to export my data in multiple formats so that I can use it in external tools and maintain data portability
acceptanceCriteria: GIVEN I am logged in and have data in the system
WHEN I navigate to the export section
THEN I should see available export formats (CSV, JSON, XML)
AND I should be able to select date ranges for export
AND I should be able to filter by data categories
AND the export should complete within reasonable time
AND I should receive a download link via email for large exports
stories.businessValue: Increases user satisfaction and reduces vendor lock-in concerns, enabling data portability
stories.technicalNotes: Implement streaming export for large datasets, queue system for background processing
risks: Large exports could impact system performance
Data privacy concerns with export functionality
File size limitations in browser downloads
dependencies: User authentication system must be complete
Data access permissions must be implemented
testCases: Export small dataset in each format
Export large dataset with background processing

personas.name: New User
personas.description: First-time users who are exploring the system and learning its capabilities
characteristics: Needs clear guidance and intuitive interfaces
May abandon if onboarding is complex
frustrations: Too many options presented at once

personas.name: Power User
personas.description: Experienced users who use the system regularly and need advanced features
characteristics: Deep domain knowledge and system familiarity
Willing to learn complex workflows for productivity gains
goals: Integrate with existing tools and workflows

personas.name: Administrator
personas.description: Users responsible for system configuration and user management
characteristics: Responsible for system security and compliance
Needs visibility into system usage and health
Manages multiple users and their permissions
Often technical but not necessarily developers

risks: Complex user stories may confuse new users
Insufficient user testing could lead to poor usability
Performance impact of advanced features on basic workflows
Feature creep from power user requests
Balancing simplicity for new users vs. power for advanced users

qualityGates.name: Story Definition Complete
criteria: Acceptance criteria are testable and specific

qualityGates.name: Implementation Ready
criteria: Effort estimate is validated by development team

qualityGates.name: Story Complete
criteria: All acceptance criteria are met and verified
Code is reviewed and meets quality standards
User testing confirms story value is delivered

effortScale.21: One month of work (should be broken down)

priorityDefinitions.CRITICAL: Must have for core functionality, blocks other work
priorityDefinitions.HIGH: Important for user value, should be in early releases
priorityDefinitions.MEDIUM: Valuable but can be delayed if necessary

statusDefinitions.NOT_STARTED: Story is defined but work has not begun
statusDefinitions.IN_REVIEW: Story is complete and undergoing review/testing
statusDefinitions.COMPLETED: Story is fully implemented and delivered
statusDefinitions.BLOCKED: Work cannot proceed due to external dependency

activities: Update priorities based on user feedback
